feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Validation Rules should be checked while running Data Actions
entry.content:
Hi All,

in my model I set one Validation Rule (I'm currently using the one with Existing Attributes) to allow data changes only for certain combinations of CCs and KFs.

What I found is that Validation rules are checked only for Manual Input or while trying to publish some data. But What about Data actions? For instance, if a run a Data Action with an Allocation step, I was expecting that my amount would be distributed only on the allowed combinations. But it is allocating for all the combinations. Only when I publish allocated numbers, data on not allowed combinations are not published: but total amount won't be my initial aggregated numbers that I need to allocate.

Any solution for my problem?

Thank you

entry.title: login/min_password_lng" as "14" what is the impact on system and communication users when we change.
entry.content: i have a small query ,currently we have communication users which is RFC , client has asked to change the password length from 8 to 14 , what is the impact on communication users?will it be changed ?or the functions on RFC will hold an error stoping the activities.

entry.title: Version variance as calculated measure at the model level
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

It appears that SAC won’t allow us to create model based calculated measures  that compare actuals to budget version for example. To be specific, it would, but you get a zero or the total value of only one version because the measure can’t access the other version. Would there be any past discussions or documentation out there that can explain this limitation?  Sounds to me like a case for an influence ticket, but I'd like to share any toughts of this matter before submitting it. 

I do know how to get it done in a story, but there are reasons why that may not the best solution: 

A) Comments. I’d like to keep my variance comments at the model level and not incur the risk of losing them when someone, by mistake, updates the name of a story measure. Keeping all the comments only on regular measures is not always practical due to quantity of information that will need to be reviewed before you get to the section you need. 

B) Let’s think about an organization trying to implement SAC for Planning and would like to involve as many users as possible to use SAC (self-service to some extent), exposing users to standardized pre-built measures, can help with the adoption of the tool. 

 

P.s. I know I can set my Budget version as actual category, but that sounds like using the system incorrectly and no documentation provided as to what can be a limitation of doing that. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Rank with others not available
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
the new feature "Rank with others" is not available for me on chart.
This option should be since last release available in Optimized design mode.
Have anybody the same issue? 

 



Regards,
Hossein

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Import on Locked Versions
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I need to enable the Planning Standard User to execute data loads into a locked version, such as "Actuals".

Currently, the Planning Standard User Role has full privileges except for Planning Professional privileges. However, when this user attempts to execute an import job, they receive a "Data locking violation" notification.

One solution is to set the version to restricted, but that isn't practical for "Actuals," as it must remain locked at all times.

What other options can we explore to achieve this goal?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Mensaje: FV635 Cargue extracto bancario
entry.content:
Buenas tardes,

Por favor su ayuda con el siguiente mensaje al cargar el extracto bancario por la transacción FF_5.

entry.title: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getName')
entry.content:
Hello Experts !

Currently i have an issue with SAC story where typeError is occurring in edit mode and the error looks like this. I am able to view the dashboard all the widgets with data in view/present mode.

[ERROR] [LWMD] - Wasn't able to reconcile data model for view:[_SYS_BIC][t.5][Cfi4291353gpdiav5s6b5lb7155], TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getName')
at https://assets.sapanalytics.cloud/production/uiAssets-2024.8.15/uiAssets/app.chunk.uqm-firefly-app-chunk.f6a7608738528c8a8bb6.js:1:334950

I request all of you to provide insights on this.

Thank you for your support !

entry.title: question on sorting dimensions with setDimensionFilter() in Table
entry.content:
Hello,

I once again need your help:

I have a Story with various graphs and tables where I want to switch the dimensions. It is working fine with the graphs with this coding:

 

Chart_NWC_TABO_Ratio_Cons.removeMeasure("5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYRFF8",Feed.ValueAxis);
Chart_NWC_TABO_Ratio_Cons.addMeasure("5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQDHW",Feed.ValueAxis);

 

 So now I try to do the same with tables, which is working:

 

Table_NWC_TABD_KPI_Cons.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQ76C",["5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQQ50","5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQJTG","5WIFOPY8PE02JBZRPE1NYQDHW"]);

 

I just have a big BUT: I am not capable of sorting the dimension the way I want it. The order should be the same as within the query (Total NetSales, NWC GC, NWC ratio). I do not find a way of changing the order. The technical names within the coding are also in the correct order.

Whatever I try, i always get this wrong order (no clue, where this even comes from):

Thanks and BR 

Clemens

entry.title: Data Action - Allocation
entry.content:
In the planning model I created a data action that allocates the quantities to the forecast in relation to the quantity ordered. Once the allocation has been carried out, I would like a new data action that allocates only the forecast quantities lower than 1000 TON to the other forecast quantities. it's possible?

Thanks

entry.title: Model - If date or timestamp of a dimension is empty insert current date or timestamp
entry.content:
Hello together,

we want to calculate the difference in days between two date fields and the difference in hours between two timestamps here. But there is no option to insert the current date/timestamp in the story? How we do that?

Sometimes its possible that one datefield or timestamp is empty. In this case we want to use the current date or timestamp. Then when we try to insert the formula date a - date b it says "Formula could not be computed. Need to specify property for a hierarchy dimension. How to do the calculation?

BR/

entry.title: P&L best Practice - SAC
entry.content:
Hey,
What is the SAC planning best practice, when creating a planning flow leading to a P&L.
Is it to have two separated dimensions CC and Account - or to concatenate the two?

I usually use two dimensions but then I find it complicated to create my P&L report.

thanks

Deb

entry.title: Concatenate Child Nodes attribute to Parent Node Attribute
entry.content:
Hii all, 

I have a requirement of concatenating the property of leaf nodes to the parent node(shown in image). I have a multi-level hierarchy for the dimension, just need to concat the child attributes 1 level above to parent node attribute . Can anyone suggest how it can be achieved in BW or SAC.

Regards.

entry.title: Linking Calendar Hierarchy and Fiscal Hierarchy Date Dimensions Using Advanced Formulas
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need assistance with linking two models in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using advanced formulas. I am encountering an error stating "Date is using a calendar hierarchy instead of a fiscal year." Here are the details of my situation:

  1. Models:

    • Finance Model[Default Model]: Uses a calendar hierarchy with year, quarter, and month.
    • OPEX Model: Uses a fiscal hierarchy with fiscal year, quarter, and period.

Date([d/Measures] = "SUM" = LINK [OPEX], [d/Measures] = "SUM", [d/Date] = [d/Date])

I need guidance on the correct approach and syntax to link these two date dimensions.

Thanks,

Pooja.

entry.title: SAC story pie chart does not show data labels/ legend if only one value
entry.content:
I have a SAC story with some pie charts. When the data is grouped into multiple groups, I see the data labels/ legends so that it is clear what the colors represent. But if I have all values in the same group, the data labels/ legends are not showing. Therefore it is not clear what the figure represents. Is it good or bad...?

How can I force the display of data labels/ legends?

I cannot find an option on the widget for this.

Please see the two screen shots.

Legend okLegend not ok

entry.title: How to load incremental data in new model type
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), Is there any way using which we can load incremental data in SAC in new Model type.

@N1kh1l ,if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this.


Regards,
Tanya Srivastava

entry.title: incremental load in classic model for backdated data
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), We are loading data in Classic Model type using incremental feature as highlighted in below screenshot, where the same is working for prospective data but how the same can be used for loading data of previous years (backdated data).

@N1kh1l if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this.

Regards,
Tanya Srivastava

entry.title: How to set up public dimension for 2 company codes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Dashboard, we need to display dashboards for two separate company codes. We have created a public dimension for Profit Centers, and there are scenarios where the same Profit Center can exist in both company codes (1000 & 2000) with different descriptions.

However, SAC does not allow loading the same member ID twice with different descriptions.

@N1kh1l , could you please provide any inputs on how to achieve this?



Regards,
Tanya Srivastava

entry.title: How to update Calculated Measure based on Page or Input Text Value?
entry.content:
Hello,

I created Calculated Measure ( Sales Ratio ) and updated both pages ( Budget, Actual) in story. The formula for Calculated Measure is different for Budget and Actual pages. I like to use the Calculated Measure name as Sales Ratio  in both pages with different formula. 

I thought to apply the formula based on Page No or Input text field value but didn't see any option to read Page No property or Input text field information in Calculated Measure .

How to achieve this requirement, any suggestions please.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Configure a Mail server on SAC with GOOGLE
entry.content:
Good Morning,

We attempted to configure an SMTP server using Google, but the configuration encountered an error. The specific error message is provided below.

Is it possible to utilize a Google SMTP server with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)?

Thanks and best regards

entry.title: Change background color row with css in SAP analytics Cloud by Dimension value
entry.content:
HI,
in the Table_6 below I would like to color the row when the month is equal to the current month with css dynamically.
How can I do?

THANKS
